declarations.description: Responsive popover web component for floating content next to an anchor element on desktop and showing it as a bottom sheet on mobile.
declarations.name: JBPopoverWebComponent

attributes.name: is-open
attributes.description: Opens the popover when set to true. Any other value closes it.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Element id. On mobile, an id enables URL hash state while the popover is open.

members.name: positionArea
members.description: Preferred anchor alignment used after bindTarget().

members.name: overflowHandler
members.description: Overflow handling mode. SLIDE moves the content upward when it overflows.

members.name: overflowDom
members.description: Element used as the overflow boundary. Defaults to the window height.

members.name: PopoverHashPath
members.description: Hash path generated from id, such as #actions-popover.

members.name: JBID
members.description: Internal unique symbol for this popover instance.

methods.name: open
methods.description: Opens the popover, updates anchor position, and pushes mobile hash history when id is set.

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the popover and removes anchor observers.

methods.name: bindTarget
methods.description: Binds the popover to an anchor element and positions it with fixed positioning on desktop.

methods.name: unBindTarget
methods.description: Removes the bound anchor and resets positioning.

methods.name: checkInitialOpenness
methods.description: Opens the popover when the current URL hash matches its id.

events.name: load
events.description: Dispatched from connectedCallback before event listeners are registered.

events.name: urlOpen
events.description: Dispatched when the popover opens itself because the current URL hash matches its id.

events.name: close
events.description: Dispatched for backdrop clicks and mobile browser-back close attempts. detail.eventType can be BACKGROUND_CLICK, HISTORY_BACK_EVENT, OUTSIDE_CLICK, or CLOSE_BUTTON_CLICK.

cssProperties.name: --jb-popover-bg-color
cssProperties.description: Background color of the content wrapper.

cssProperties.name: --jb-popover-border-radius
cssProperties.description: Border radius of the content wrapper.

cssProperties.name: --jb-popover-top
cssProperties.description: Top position in desktop mode when not bound to an anchor.
